<!-- MAIN JAVASCRIPT - CLICK BASED DESKTOP MENU -->
<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {

        // DESKTOP: CLICK TO TOGGLE MEGA MENU
        const menuItems = document.querySelectorAll('.menu_Bar > ul > li');

        menuItems.forEach(item => {
            const link = item.querySelector('a');
            const dropdown = item.querySelector('.cs-dropdown');

            if (!dropdown) return;

            link.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                const isActive = item.classList.contains('cs-active');

                // Close all other menus
                document.querySelectorAll('.menu_Bar > ul > li.cs-active').forEach(activeItem => {
                    if (activeItem !== item) activeItem.classList.remove('cs-active');
                });

                // Toggle current
                item.classList.toggle('cs-active');

                // Prevent navigation only if dropdown exists
                if (dropdown.querySelector('.megamenu-verticle-left')) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                }
            });
        });

        // Close on click outside
        document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
            if (!e.target.closest('.menu_Bar')) {
                document.querySelectorAll('.menu_Bar > ul > li.cs-active').forEach(item => {
                    item.classList.remove('cs-active');
                });
            }
        });

        // Tab switching inside mega menu (still on hover)
        document.querySelectorAll('.megamenu-verticle-tab-list a[data-tab]').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () {
                const tabId = this.getAttribute('data-tab');
                const parent = this.closest('.cs-dropdown');
                parent.querySelectorAll('.megamenu-verticle-tab-list a').forEach(a => a.classList
                    .remove('my_acitve'));
                parent.querySelectorAll('.Menu-tab-container').forEach(c => c.classList.remove(
                    'active__tab_menu'));
                this.classList.add('my_acitve');
                document.getElementById(tabId)?.classList.add('active__tab_menu');
            });
        });

        // MOBILE MENU (unchanged)
        const hamburger = document.getElementById('mobileHamburger');
        const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
        const overlay = document.querySelector('.mobile-menu-overlay');
        const closeBtn = document.querySelector('.mobile-close');

        function openMenu() {
            mobileMenu.classList.add('active');
            overlay.classList.add('active');
            hamburger.classList.add('active');
            document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
        }

        function closeMenu() {
            mobileMenu.classList.remove('active');
            overlay.classList.remove('active');
            hamburger.classList.remove('active');
            document.body.style.overflow = '';
        }

        hamburger.addEventListener('click', openMenu);
        closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', closeMenu);

        document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-toggle').forEach(toggle => {
            toggle.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                this.classList.toggle('rotated');
                this.closest('.mobile-nav-item').querySelector('.mobile-submenu').classList.toggle(
                    'active');
            });
        });

        document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-submenu_li').forEach(item => {
            const link = item.querySelector('.mobile-sub-link');
            const submenu = item.querySelector('.mobile-subsubmenu');
            const toggle = item.querySelector('.sub-toggle');
            if (!submenu) return;
            link.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                if (toggle && (e.target === toggle || toggle.contains(e.target))) e
                    .preventDefault();
                submenu.classList.toggle('active');
                if (toggle) toggle.classList.toggle('rotated');
            });
        });

        // Sticky header
        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            document.getElementById('site-header').classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 80);
        });
    });
</script>

<script src="https://cdn.elitemindz.co/admin/js/jquery-3.6.0.min.js"></script>

<script>
    $(document).ready(function () {
        $(".megamenu-verticle-tab-list a").on("mouseenter", function () {
            var tabId = $(this).data("tab");
            $(this).closest('.cs-dropdown').find(".megamenu-verticle-tab-list a").removeClass("my_acitve");
            $(this).closest('.cs-dropdown').find(".Menu-tab-container").removeClass("active__tab_menu");
            $(this).addClass("my_acitve");
            $("#" + tabId).addClass("active__tab_menu");
        });
    });
</script><html lang="en">

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script defer>
    const showPopup = () => {
        const popup = document.getElementById("popup_one");
        const overlay = document.getElementById("overlay_one");
        if (!popup || !overlay) return;

        popup.style.display = "block";
        overlay.style.display = "block";
    };

    const closePopup = () => {
        const popup = document.getElementById("popup_one");
        const overlay = document.getElementById("overlay_one");
        if (!popup || !overlay) return;

        popup.style.display = "none";
        overlay.style.display = "none";
    };

    window.addEventListener("load", showPopup);
</script>

<script>
    $(document).ready(function () {


        if ($(window).width() > 786) {
            return;
        }
        $('.footer-toggle-click').on('click', function () {


            // Toggle the next ul
            $(this).next('.footer-toggle-open').slideToggle();

            // Toggle Plus/Minus
            var span = $(this).find('span');
            if (span.text() === '+') {
                span.text('-');
            } else {
                span.text('+');
            }
        });

    });
</script>

<script>
    $(document).ready(function () {
        $('#newsletter').on('submit', function (e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            $.ajax({
                url: $(this).attr('action'),
                type: 'POST',
                data: $(this).serialize(),
                dataType: 'json',
                success: function (response) {
                    // Use response.Status and response.message
                    if (response.Status === 'Success') {
                        $('#newsletter-success')
                            .css('color', '#fff')
                            .fadeIn()
                            .text(response.message);
                        $('#newsletter')[0].reset(); // Clear the form
                    } else {
                        $('#newsletter-success')
                            .css('color', '#fff')
                            .fadeIn()
                            .text(response.message);
                    }

                    // Optionally hide message after 5 seconds
                    setTimeout(function () {
                        $('#newsletter-success').fadeOut();
                    }, 5000);
                },
                error: function () {
                    $('#newsletter-success')
                        .css('color', '#fff')
                        .fadeIn()
                        .text("Something went wrong. Please try again.");
                    setTimeout(function () {
                        $('#newsletter-success').fadeOut();
                    }, 5000);
                }
            });
        });
    });
</script>

<script>
    // Button click se popup kholne ke liye
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
        const consultButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.banner-button');
        consultButtons.forEach(button => {
            button.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                e.preventDefault(); // default link ka action rok do
                document.getElementById('exitPopup_intent').style.display = 'flex';
            });
        });
    });
</script>

<script>
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
        let currentIndex = 0;
        const slides_intent = document.getElementById("slides_intent");
        if (!slides_intent) return; // Prevent error if not found

        const totalSlides = slides_intent.children.length;

        function updateSlide() {
            slides_intent.style.transform = `translateX(-${currentIndex * 100}%)`;
        }

        function moveSlide(step) {
            currentIndex += step;
            if (currentIndex < 0) currentIndex = totalSlides - 1;
            if (currentIndex >= totalSlides) currentIndex = 0;
            updateSlide();
        }

        setInterval(() => moveSlide(1), 4000);

        // Optional: Attach to buttons if present
        document.querySelectorAll(".nav-btn_intent").forEach((btn, index) => {
            btn.addEventListener("click", () => moveSlide(index === 0 ? -1 : 1));
        });
    });
</script>

<script>

// let popup_intentShown = false;
// document.addEventListener("mouseleave", function(e) {
//     if (!popup_intentShown && e.clientY < 10) {
//         document.getElementById("exitPopup_intent").style.display = "flex";
//         popup_intentShown = true;
//     }
// });

  let popupShown = false;

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    setTimeout(function () {
      if (!popupShown) {
        document.getElementById("exitPopup_intent").style.display = "flex";
        popupShown = true;
      }
    }, 5000); // 5000ms = 5 seconds
  });

// let popup_intentShown = false;

// // Get current page path
// let currentPath = window.location.pathname;

// // Disable popup only on this page
// if (currentPath !== '/elitemindz/products/school-erp') {
//     document.addEventListener("mouseleave", function(e) {
//         if (!popup_intentShown && e.clientY < 10) {
//             document.getElementById("exitPopup_intent").style.display = "flex";
//             popup_intentShown = true;
//         }
//     });
// }


// Simple phone number validation
function validatePhoneNumber(phone) {
    // Basic validation - at least 7 digits
    const phoneRegex = /^[0-9\s\()]{7,}$/;
    return phoneRegex.test(phone);
}

$(document).ready(function() {
    $('#intent_form').on('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();

        // $('#emailError').text("").hide(); // reset error state

        // const email = $('#email').val().trim();
        // const emailRegex = /^[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.(com|in|org|net|edu)$/;

        // if (!emailRegex.test(email)) {
        //     $('#emailError')
        //     .text("Please enter a valid email like name@gmail.com")
        //     .show();
        //     return;
        // }

        const phoneNumber = $('#phone').val().trim();
        // console.log("Phone number entered:", phoneNumber);
        const isValidNumber = validatePhoneNumber(phoneNumber);
        // console.log("Valid?", isValidNumber);

        // if (!isValidNumber) {
        //     $('#error-message').text("Please enter a valid phone number.").show();
        //     setTimeout(() => $('#error-message').hide(), 5000);
        //     return;
        // }

        $('#submit-btn .btn-text').hide();
        $('#submit-btn .spinner-border').show();
        $('#submit-btn').prop('disabled', true);

        $('#success-message').hide();
        $('#error-message').hide();

        // AJAX call to your controller - RESTORED
        $.ajax({
            // url: 'frontend/intent_submit',
            url: 'https://elitemindz.co/frontend/intent_submit',
            type: 'POST',
            data: $(this).serialize(),
            success: function(response) {
                $('#submit-btn .spinner-border').hide();
                $('#submit-btn .btn-text').show();
                $('#submit-btn').prop('disabled', false);
                // $('#emailError').text("").hide();


                $('#success-message').show();
                setTimeout(() => $('#success-message').hide(), 5000);

                // Reset form
                $('#intent_form')[0].reset();

                setTimeout(function() {
                    document.getElementById("exitPopup_intent").style.display =
                        "none";
                }, 3000);
            },
            error: function(xhr, status, error) {
                $('#submit-btn .spinner-border').hide();
                $('#submit-btn .btn-text').show();
                $('#submit-btn').prop('disabled', false);

                $('#error-message').text(
                    "There was an error submitting the form. Please try again.").show();
                setTimeout(() => $('#error-message').hide(), 5000);

                // console.error('Error:', error);
            }
        });
    });
});
</script>

<script>
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
        const dropdownBtn = document.querySelector(".selected-countrys");
        const countryList = document.querySelector(".country-lists");
        const selectedFlag = dropdownBtn.querySelector(".flag");
        const selectedCode = dropdownBtn.querySelector(".code");

        // Toggle the dropdown visibility
        dropdownBtn.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
            countryList.classList.toggle("show");
            event.stopPropagation();  // Prevents the click event from propagating to the document
        });

        // Close dropdown when clicking outside
        document.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
            if (!event.target.closest(".country-dropdowns")) {
                countryList.classList.remove("show");
            }
        });

        // Handle country selection
        countryList.querySelectorAll("li").forEach(function (item) {
            item.addEventListener("click", function () {
                const countryCode = item.getAttribute("data-code");
                const flagUrl = item.getAttribute("data-flag");
                const countryPhoneCode = item.textContent.split(' +')[1].trim(); // Extract phone code

                // Update the selected country flag and code
                selectedFlag.innerHTML = `<img src="${flagUrl}" class="flag" loading="lazy">`;
                selectedCode.textContent = `+${countryPhoneCode}`;

                // Set the country code in the hidden input field
                document.getElementById('country_code2').value = countryCode;

                // Close the dropdown
                countryList.classList.remove("show");
            });
        });

        // On form submit, ensure only the phone number (without country code) is set in mobile1
        document.getElementById('intent_form').addEventListener('submit', function (event) {
            const phoneNumber = document.getElementById('phone').value;
            const countryCode = document.getElementById('country_code2').value;

            if (phoneNumber && countryCode) {
                // Remove the country code from the phone number
                const phoneWithoutCountryCode = phoneNumber.replace(countryCode, '').trim();

                // Set the mobile number (without country code) in the hidden input
                document.getElementById('mobile2').value = phoneWithoutCountryCode;

                // Ensure that the country code is correctly stored in the country_code1 hidden input
                document.getElementById('country_code2').value = countryCode;

            } else {
                event.preventDefault(); // Prevent form submission if the mobile number or country code is missing
                // alert("Please enter a valid mobile number and select a country.");
                console.log("Please enter a valid mobile number and select a country.");
            }
        });

        // Set the default country (India) if it's not already set
        const defaultCountryCode = '+91';
        const countryCodeInput = document.getElementById('country_code2');

        if (!countryCodeInput.value) {
            countryCodeInput.value = defaultCountryCode;
            selectedCode.textContent = defaultCountryCode;
            selectedFlag.innerHTML = `<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/flag-icon-css@3.5.0/flags/4x3/in.svg" class="flag" loading="lazy">`;
        }
    });
</script>

</html>
